name: Bacon Potato Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 3-quart casserole, combine diced potatoes, bacon pieces, chopped onion, butter/margaraine, chopped celery, chicken broth, and sliced carrots.
2. Cover the dish loosely with plastic wrap.
3. Microwave on high for 13-15 minutes or until the potatoes are tender, stirring once during cooking.
4. Stir in milk, salt, and pepper.
5. Recover the dish with plastic wrap and cook at high temperature for 8 more minutes or until heated through.
